title: Twin Sisters of Kyoto
actors: Shima Iwashita, Hiroyuki Nagato, Seiji Miyaguchi
plot: Two twin girls are separated at birth. One grows up in a loving family. The other one doesn't. They finally meet by complete accident on a town fair. No one ever told them about the other one so they begin familiarizing with each ...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 3 wins & 1 nomination total
